required_start_sequence: run build_index before substantive repo work
authority_order: indexed search results as candidate pointers only
index_usage_protocol.verification_rule: Any indexed hit used for a current workflow/runtime decision must be confirmed by direct read of the authoritative root file or by a validation command.
index_usage_protocol.sandbox_copy_rule: Indexed copies under _public_sandbox/mcp-tests are historical or public-sandbox material and must never outrank root _workflow/state.json, root SERVER_*.json, root _tests, or live runtime status.
index_usage_protocol.query_rule: Path-qualified searches are helpful but insufficient; filter result paths by authority before drawing conclusions.

auth.summary: Authentication modes and port policy are specified in SERVER_AUTH_SPEC.json.

profiles.summary: Named server profiles, profile schema validation and tool surface rules are specified in SERVER_PROFILES_SPEC.json.

tools.summary: MCP-callable tool catalogue and surface classification. Public and authorized tools are exposed through MCP tools/list according to profile/auth policy; internal tools are hidden technical modules and must not be exposed by MCP schema.

deprecated_surface_classes.non_public_mcp_tools: Deprecated umbrella term. Use authorized_mcp_tools for MCP-exposed authenticated tools and internal_hidden_tools for server-internal hidden tools.

tools.current_migration_note: MCP-exposed authenticated facades are loaded through tools/authorized. tools/internal is reserved for hidden technical helpers that are not exposed through MCP schema/tools/list.

root_policy.rule: Root-level active runtime/repo directories are allowlisted. Developer, workflow, generated, fixture, backup, sandbox, and temporary structures must live under underscore-prefixed or dot-prefixed locations unless explicitly allowlisted here.

tolerated_legacy_root_items.target: tools/public, tools/authorized, tools/internal plus src implementation modules
tolerated_legacy_root_items.rationale: Canonical loading goes through tools/public and tools/internal facades, but implementations remain flat pending facade/implementation split.

Step38P extracted CLI parsing and static docs; Step38Q extracted HTTP server factory/route wiring; Step38R extracted self-test/startup lifecycle; Step38S extracted RPC/MCP handler wiring; Step38T extracted runtime context assembly; Step38U extracted runtime status provider assembly; Step38V extracted optional-tools assembly; Step38W extracted audit/document/toolsList support assembly; Step38X extracted process/bootstrap configuration and final startup wiring into src/runtime/server_bootstrap_runtime.js. Root server.js is now a thin entrypoint that delegates to runServerBootstrapRuntime(...).
Historical local backup file tolerated until cleanup step.

src.purpose: Active TEST MCP source modules. Runtime code, policy helpers, schemas, metadata, and implementation helpers live here; root-level auth/schemas/util directories are forbidden.

dirs.auth: Authentication modes, transition guards, and auth policy helpers.
dirs.util: Shared policy, path, network, and code-workspace utilities.
dirs.runtime: Runtime handlers and future server.js container extraction target.
dirs.plugin: Reserved target for plugin subsystem implementation split.
dirs.exec: Reserved target for execution wrapper internals.

tools.purpose: Connector tool facade layer and legacy implementation debt boundary.

dirs.public: MCP-exposed public facades visible in public profile tools/list.
dirs.authorized: MCP-exposed authenticated facades visible only when profile/auth policy allows them.
dirs.internal: Hidden technical facades and helpers not exposed through MCP schema/tools/list.

tools.legacy_flat_tools: Flat tools/*.js are legacy implementation modules until schema extraction and facade migration are complete.

profiles.purpose: Profile fixture and policy configuration files. This is an active root directory introduced after the original topology contract.

plugins.purpose: Real manifest-backed plugin candidates only. Test templates belong under _tests/fixtures, not plugins/.

docker.purpose: Docker and devcontainer scaffolding. Canonical devcontainer path is docker/.devcontainer.

authz_decision.summary: Cross-category allow/deny decision contract spanning auth, profiles and tools. It is specified separately because it belongs to more than one main category.

--self-test.description: run connector shape/profile policy self-test and exit

stage12.summary: Historical Stage 12 planning/spec work moved out of root server spec.

policy_extension_model.rule: new per-tool, per-auth-mode or per-category policies must be introduced through dedicated SPEC files and profile schema evolution, not by adding new CLI parameters
